# KanseiLink

> The rating agency for the AI agent era. KanseiLink rates Agent Readiness — the ability of companies and software to be used safely and effectively by AI agents — across five domains (AI Access, AI Discoverability, AI Execution, AI Trust, AI Compatibility). Flagship publication: the quarterly Agent Readiness Index for Japan's leading SaaS. Evidence base: a database of 11,000+ global and Japanese SaaS/MCP services rated AAA–D on publicly verifiable facts — official MCP availability, API openness, documentation and auth-method clarity — plus first-party connectivity probes: 3,475 successful JSON-RPC handshakes against hosted MCP endpoints out of 4,367 probe attempts by our own scanner (as of 2026-07). Per-service success-rate figures are not published until independent third-party agent telemetry reaches sufficient scale (see Principles of Independence). Ratings are recomputed daily; the Agent Readiness Index is published quarterly. A product of Synapse Arrows Pte. Ltd. (Singapore).

## Main resources
- Ratings home: https://kansei-link.com
- ARI Award 2026 Summer (Japan): https://kansei-link.com/ari-award/2026-summer.html — 200 Japanese SaaS verified against vendor primary sources, 41 certified A or above (AAA: 11, AA: 21, A: 9); official MCP availability, API openness, auth method, developer docs; methodology fully disclosed
- Agent Readiness Index 2026 Summer (β, archive): https://kansei-link.com/agent-readiness-index.html — initial 31-company version (2026-07-13), superseded by ARI Award 2026 Summer
- Principles of Independence: https://kansei-link.com/independence.html — ratings are never for sale; formula public; conflicts disclosed
- Solutions by audience: https://kansei-link.com/solutions.html — rating breakdown reports for SaaS vendors, custom assessments for investors/procurement, SaaS selection support for enterprises, free MCP data access for agent builders
- AEO Score Checker: https://kansei-link.com/checker/
- Docs: https://docs.kansei-link.com
- MCP server (open source): https://github.com/kansei-link/kansei-mcp-server
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@kansei-link/mcp-server

## Research & insights
- What is MCP: https://kansei-link.com/insights/what-is-mcp.html
- AEO methodology: https://kansei-link.com/insights/aeo-methodology.html
- AEO ranking Q2 2026: https://kansei-link.com/insights/aeo-ranking-q2-2026.html
- MCP vs API: https://kansei-link.com/insights/mcp-vs-api.html

## What it solves
- Agents waste tokens on trial-and-error SaaS integration: KanseiLink provides current, structured integration intelligence (auth setup, pitfalls, workarounds) for 11,000+ services.
- Vendors can't see how AI agents experience their APIs: AEO Scores and failure-mode reports quantify agent readiness.

## Company
- Synapse Arrows Pte. Ltd. (Singapore): https://synapsearrows.com
- Sibling products: Linksee Memory https://linksee.app · ScaNavi https://scanavi.app
